AutoOpen.Name: Open Selection Automatically
AutoOpen.Hint: Show the hero selection screen to players who connect without an assigned character.

SheetAccess.Name: Allow Viewing Character Sheets
SheetAccess.Hint: When enabled, players can open a hero's character sheet from the selection screen. Observer access is granted on demand only to the player who clicks View, and is cleared again (back to Default) once they claim another hero, when this is turned off, or on the next world load.

Menu.Name: Hero Roster
Menu.Label: Configure Roster
Menu.Hint: Drag and drop Actors to build the roster of heroes players can claim.

RolesMenu.Name: Team Roles
RolesMenu.Label: Configure Roles
RolesMenu.Hint: Define the roles (Tank, Healer, DPS, …) used for team-composition guidance.

SoundMenu.Name: Selection Sounds
SoundMenu.Label: Configure Sounds
SoundMenu.Hint: Customize the sounds played on the hero selection screen and their volume.

VisualMenu.Name: Selection Background
VisualMenu.Label: Configure Background
VisualMenu.Hint: Set an image or video background for the hero selection screen.

DescriptionConfig.Title: Claim Your Hero — Description Source

UseActorDesc.label: Read Description from Actor Sheet
UseActorDesc.hint: Default source for heroes whose description mode is "Inherit". When off, only the custom text written in the presentation editor is shown. When on, the Actor sheet's description is shown, falling back to the custom text when it is empty. The field read from the sheet is set below.

Path.label: Actor Description Field
Path.hint: Dot-path of the description field read from the Actor sheet, relative to the Actor (e.g. system.details.biography.value).

DescriptionConfig.SystemKnown: Detected system: {system}. A built-in description field is registered for it ({path}).
DescriptionConfig.SystemUnknown: Your game system ({system}) has no built-in description field. Set the dot-path manually below. If you'd like built-in support added, please open a request:

img.label: Card Image
img.hint: Optional image shown on the hero grid card (always square). Falls back to the Actor portrait.

detailImg.label: Detail Image
detailImg.hint: Optional image shown in the side panel when a player selects this hero. Falls back to the card image.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Custom rich-text shown to players when they inspect this hero. Used directly in "Custom" mode, and as the fallback when the Actor sheet's description is empty.

descriptionMode.label: Description Source
descriptionMode.hint: Where the player-facing description comes from. The text below is used in "Custom" mode, or as a fallback when the Actor sheet has none.

name.label: Role Name
name.hint: Short label shown on badges and chips (e.g. Tank, Healer).

img.label: Role Icon
img.hint: Image shown as the role's badge. Click to choose any image with the File Picker.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Optional plain-text blurb shown to players as a tooltip on the role badge.

RoleConfig.Title: Claim Your Hero — Roles
RoleConfig.NoRoles: No roles yet. Add one to enable team-composition guidance.
RoleConfig.RemoveConfirm: Remove the role "{name}"? Heroes tagged with it and any recommendation will simply drop it.
RoleConfig.ResetConfirm: Reset the catalog to the default roles? Your custom roles will be replaced and the recommended composition cleared. Heroes keep their tags, but ids of removed roles are ignored.
RoleConfig.RecommendedHint: Select the roles your party should cover. Players see them, with gaps highlighted, on the selection screen.
RoleConfig.NoRolesRecommend: Add roles above to recommend a composition.

Tank.name: Tank
Tank.desc: Holds the front line and absorbs damage to protect allies.

Healer.name: Healer
Healer.desc: Restores health and keeps the party standing.

Support.name: Support
Support.desc: Buffs allies, debuffs enemies, and controls the battlefield.

Controller.name: Controller
Controller.desc: Locks down enemies with crowd control and area effects.

Face.name: Face
Face.desc: Leads social encounters through diplomacy and persuasion.

RosterConfig.Title: Claim Your Hero — Roster
RosterConfig.DropHint: Drag Actors or an Actor Folder here (sidebar or Compendium) to add them to the roster
RosterConfig.NoHeroes: No heroes yet. Drag an Actor above to begin.
RosterConfig.DragHint: Drag onto a player to assign this hero
RosterConfig.DropSlot: Drag a hero here to assign it
RosterConfig.Unassign: Unassign this hero (returns it to the available list)
RosterConfig.OpenFor: Open selection screen for this player
RosterConfig.OpenForAllTip: Open the hero selection screen on every connected player's client
RosterConfig.Duplicate: This Actor is already in the roster.
RosterConfig.FolderNoneAdded: No new Actors were found in this folder.
RosterConfig.RemoveConfirm: Remove {name} from the roster? The Actor itself is not deleted.
RosterConfig.ReleaseConfirm: Release {name} from {user}? Ownership and character assignment will be removed.
RosterConfig.AssignReplace: Their current character ({current}) will be unlinked and its ownership revoked.
RosterConfig.AssignTaken: This hero is already claimed by another player. Unassign it first.
RosterConfig.AssignFailed: The assignment could not be completed. Check the console for details.
RosterConfig.ViewersTip: Players who can currently view this hero's sheet
RosterConfig.CleanIllegalTip: Revoke view permissions that players were granted on heroes they no longer have open

HeroEditor.Title: Hero Presentation
HeroEditor.RolesHint: Select the roles this hero can play. Shown to players and used for composition guidance.

hover.label: Hover Sound
hover.hint: Played when the cursor moves over a hero card.

select.label: Selection Sound
select.hint: Played when a hero is selected.

confirm.label: Confirmation Sound
confirm.hint: Played when a player confirms their claim.

volume.label: Volume
volume.hint: Single volume applied to all module sounds.

title.label: Selection Title
title.hint: Heading shown to players at the top of the hero selection screen. Leave blank to use the default.

type.label: Background Type
type.hint: Choose the type of background displayed on the hero selection screen.

imageSrc.label: Image File
imageSrc.hint: Image displayed as the full-screen background.

videoSrc.label: Video File
videoSrc.hint: Video played as the full-screen background (always muted, loops continuously).

overlayOpacity.label: Content Overlay Opacity
overlayOpacity.hint: Darkness of the veil drawn over the background to keep text and cards readable. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.

Selection.Title: Claim Your Hero
Selection.ReleaseFailed: The hero could not be released. Please try again.
Selection.Released: {name} released. You can now choose another hero.
Selection.YourHeroHint: This is your current hero. Release it to choose another.
Selection.NoHeroes: The Game Master has not prepared any heroes yet.
Selection.NoGM: A Game Master must be connected to confirm your claim.
Selection.SheetNoPermission: You do not have permission to view this character sheet.

Error.missing: This hero is no longer available in the roster.
Error.taken: Another player has already claimed this hero.
Error.alreadyHas: You already have a character assigned.
Error.failed: The claim could not be completed. Please try again.
